name: Chicken and Shrimp Saute
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Boned skinned chicken, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, melt 2 tablespoons of butter.
2. Add chicken and shrimp to the skillet. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, until the chicken is light golden and the shrimp are pink, about 4 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken and shrimp; set aside.
5. To the same skillet, add peppers. Cook until they are crisp-tender.
6. Break up the tomatoes in the can and add them to the skillet. Heat until bubbling.
7. Add the chicken and shrimp back into the skillet.
8. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter, one tablespoon at a time, until just melted.
9. Arrange pasta on a platter; top with the chicken-shrimp mixture.
